selected_topic: Four-legged heroes: international dog squad helps save lives after Venezuela earthquakes | CNN
news_angle: Specially trained international dogs have been searching rubble after Venezuelan earthquakes, helping save lives trapped under nearly 200 collapsed buildings.
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao leads a squad of heroic dogs dressed like elite rescue agents sniffing through a chaotic cartoonish quake-cracked cityscape. Hunk Mao sports a black rescue vest and cap, holding a high-tech scent tracker while standing on a rubble mound shaped like a giant shoe print. Around him, animated dogs with detective hats and goggles sniff out tiny hidden characters and objects buried in debris shaped like bones and paw prints. In the background, collapsed buildings cartoonishly crumble with cracks shaped like scent trails. Rescue-themed props like dog tags, fire hydrants, and ‘sniff lines’ drawn in the dust pepper the scene. Tiny easter eggs include a cat-shaped broken statue, a lost chew toy, and a mischievous pigeon wearing aviator goggles flying overhead. The style is dynamic, colorful, and full of energy, capturing Hunk Mao’s confident grin and sporty pose as the heroic team sniffs out survivors.
image_prompt: A square, vibrant digital illustration featuring Hunk Mao as a charismatic sporty orange tabby cat wearing a black rescue vest, cap, and holding a high-tech scent tracker gadget. He stands heroically atop a pile of rubble shaped like a giant shoe print smelling for survivors. Around him is an international dog rescue squad with expressive dog characters wearing detective hats, goggles, and rescue gear, energetically sniffing out the disaster area with visible scent trails. The background shows a stylized quake-damaged city with cartoonish cracked buildings shaped like scent or paw prints. Foreground and midground contain rescue props like fire hydrants, dog tags, paw print debris, bones, and hidden tiny Easter eggs: a cat statue broken into pieces, a hidden chew toy, a sneaky pigeon with aviator goggles flying overhead. The style is youthful, dynamic, and crowded with tiny humorous details, maintaining Hunk Mao’s mischievous confident personality. REQUIRED TEXT: "VENEZUELA QUAKE" in large clear block letters at the rubble base.
easter_eggs: A broken cat statue with orange tabby stripes on the rubble background
A tiny hidden chew toy shaped like a bone under rubble
A pigeon wearing tiny aviator goggles flying above the rescue scene
Scent trails visually resembling paw prints swirling around the rubble
Dog tags hanging from a bent fire hydrant
A tiny mouse peeking from a crack in the wall looking scared
A barely visible tiny international flags on dog collars representing different countries
A crushed smartphone with a cracked screen showing a barking emoji
A small poster torn on the rubble showing a paw print logo
A cartoon style rat dressed like a mini firefighter carrying a water hose
caption: After two powerful earthquakes in Venezuela, specially trained dogs have spent days sniffing through rubble to rescue people trapped under nearly 200 collapsed buildings. Even Hunk Mao knows when the dogs are on the scent, no disaster can hide from their four-legged hero squad!
risk_notes: No political figures or realistic political symbols included. The scene balances seriousness of rescue with playful metaphor. No misleading claims or unrealistic portrayals of rescue work.
